results.title: Dupely
results.content:
# Dupely
You only need one tool to stop overpaying
Technology, Information and Internet • N/A • 58 followers • 11-50 employees

## Overview
Dupely helps shoppers cut through the noise of lookalike products, fake reviews, and pricing tricks. We surface smarter, trusted alternatives across Amazon, Walmart, Wayfair, TikTok Shop, and more. Our goal is to solve this problem across every major marketplace shoppers use. No guesswork. No gimmicks. Just the right product, at the right price, from a source you can trust. Available now on iOS, Android, Chrome, and Brave.

### Website

### Crunchbase
N/A
### LinkedIn
N/A

### Industry
Technology, Information and Internet [...] Dupely (2mo): That "50% off" deal on Amazon? The price was raised two weeks ago. That's not some "glitch". That's how online marketplaces work today. Prices get inflated before "sales." Reviews get manipulated. Identical products get listed dozens of times at wildly different prices. And no existing tool actually solves this. They just hand you a coupon code and hope for the best. So we built Dupely. Our AI works in real time while you shop to: → Detect pricing games and flag inflated "deals" → Surface better-value alternatives ranked by our proprietary Dupe Score → Analyze seller trust signals and review authenticity → Show you the right product at the right price, not just the cheapest one Alpha users saved an average of 38% per purchase. Average product price dropped from $45 to $28, [...] purchase. Average product price dropped from $45 to $28, without sacrificing quality. Early Access is now open! 👉 Sign up to get the download link → dupely.io Available as a browser extension + mobile app. [Likes: 13, Comments: 0]; Dupely (4mo): We just opened the beta waitlist for Dupely. This has been years of watching online shopping get louder, messier, and less honest, and deciding to actually do something about it. Too many identical products, fake certainty, manipulated prices, and reviews you can’t trust. Dupely is built to cut through that and give people confidence at the moment they’re about to buy. No hype. No gimmicks. Just clarity. We put together a short intro video to show what we’re building and why. If you’ve ever hesitated before clicking buy because something felt off,

results.content:
sellers to find the same product or similar alternatives. → Compare better options instantly See price differences, seller ratings, and reviews in one place. → Open the option you prefer Jump directly to the listing and continue shopping. KEY FEATURES Find the Same or Similar Products Dupely identifies listings that match the product you are viewing. Compare Prices Across Sellers See if the same product is available for less from another seller. Shop from Trusted Sellers Dupely highlights sellers with strong ratings and reliable listings. Save Time While Shopping No need to search multiple listings or marketplaces to compare options. Transparency Dupely may earn a small commission when you click through to listings and make a purchase. This helps keep Dupely free to use. We are not [...] Find the same or similar product for less right where you’re shopping! Today, the product you are looking at is often sold by multiple sellers on the same marketplace, sometimes at very different prices. Most shoppers only see the listing they landed on. → Dupely helps you see if a better option exists before you buy. Dupely finds the same or similar product from trusted sellers so you can compare price, reviews, and seller reputation instantly. Instead of searching across multiple websites or listings, Dupely scans thousands of listings to surface better options in seconds. HOW DUPELY WORKS → Browse any product online Shop normally on your favorite marketplaces and websites. → Dupely scans thousands of listings We search across sellers to find the same product or similar alternatives. → [...] ## Ratings & Reviews

 5.0

  out of 5

  41 Ratings

 ### Easy to use

  Suzi Constant

  As soon the app opens, there price drops of products that I’m interested in. You can choose what store you’re shopping on (the stores they have on the spot right now). When you search up a product, it shows the same product at different prices or similar products at better prices as well. It’s really cool and easy to use
 ### Luxe Looks Without the Price Tag

  Su zz

  Dupely makes it so easy to find affordable alternatives without sacrificing style. I love how quickly I can discover dupes for products I’ve been eyeing, it saves time and money while still getting the same look and vibe. Super user-friendly and perfect for anyone who loves a good find without the high price tag.
 ### Great app

results.title: Dupely | Same Product, Better Prices
results.content:
## Everything You Need to Shop Amazon

Smarter

We went deep on Amazon before going wide. Dupely works the second you land on a product page. It finds the identical dupe and scores it. It surfaces daily price drops and deals of the day. It flags the bestsellers and viral products that have cheaper twins. And it hands you promo codes before checkout, even the ones that haven't dropped yet.

Built for Amazon first. More marketplaces on the way.

### amazon

Works right inside your browser while you shop

30–75%

typical savings on best-selling products

### DupeScore dupe detection

Find the identical product for less, scored 0 to 100 so you know it's a real match.

### Price drops & daily deals

Daily price drops, live deals, and deals of the day, surfaced the moment they hit. [...] Add to Chrome

Add to Chrome

Stop Overpaying.

## About this app

Dupely helps you find the best deals on duplicate listings from platforms like Amazon. We help users save an average of 20% or more on their shopping and help make more informed purchasing decisions to trust your purchase from online stores.

Updated on

Jun 24, 2026

Shopping

arrow\_forward
